manager.title: Sito web
manager.subtitle: Crea e pubblica le pagine pubbliche del tuo studio.
manager.chooseHomepageStyle: Scegli uno stile per la homepage
manager.homepageBrowse: Sfoglia {count} layout pronti — ogni blocco è completamente modificabile e pubblichi quando sei pronto.
manager.addPageFromTemplate: Aggiungi una pagina da un modello
manager.addPageFromTemplateHint: Inizia una pagina comune con testo e layout già impostati.
manager.noPagesYet: Nessuna pagina ancora. Scegli un modello sopra o creane una con « + Nuova pagina ».

setup.websiteReady: Il tuo sito web è pronto
setup.title: Configura il tuo sito web
setup.subtitle: Sfoglia 20 layout iniziali e 30 stili tipografici. Aggiungi il branding, anteprima e genera — tutto resta modificabile nell'editor visuale.
setup.pagesWillBeCreated: Verranno create {count, plural, one {# pagina} other {# pagine}} · La homepage viene pubblicata alla generazione
setup.homepageTemplateHint: Scorri {count} layout — ognuno è un punto di partenza completamente modificabile.
setup.typographyHint: 30 abbinamenti curati — tocca per vedere come leggerà il tuo sito.
setup.starterPagesHint: Deseleziona le pagine che non ti servono ancora.

branding.title: Il tuo branding
branding.subtitle: Inserisci logo e colori — si applicano subito all'anteprima sotto.
branding.taglinePlaceholder: es. Auckland · Tutte le età benvenute

fraunces-hanken.label: Iris & Ink
fraunces-hanken.description: Warm serif headlines with crisp sans body.

home-classic.label: Classic
home-classic.description: Bannière, grille d'atouts, vitrine de cours, témoignages, appel à l'action et contact.

home-showcase.label: Showcase
home-showcase.description: Mise en page axée image : bannière audacieuse, vitrine de cours, galerie et témoignages.

home-minimal.label: Minimal
home-minimal.description: Page d'accueil épurée : bannière, intro, cours et appel à l'action.

home-bold.label: Bold
home-bold.description: Bannière plein écran, bandeau de stats, parcours de cours, aperçu actualités et CTA d'inscription.

page-schedule.label: Schedule
page-schedule.description: Emploi du temps hebdomadaire avec filtres par jour et studio.

page-people.label: People
page-people.description: Grille d'instructeurs à partir des profils du personnel.

page-shop.label: Shop
page-shop.description: Catalogue produits avec filtres par catégorie et paiement.

page-about.label: About
page-about.description: Racontez votre histoire : bannière, texte, valeurs et CTA final.

page-classes.label: Classes
page-classes.description: Page dédiée aux cours avec FAQ et CTA d'inscription.

page-contact.label: Contact
page-contact.description: Coordonnées et horaires, plus une courte FAQ.

home-academy.label: Academy
home-academy.description: Institution-style layout: bold hero, credentials strip, programmes and faculty.

home-spotlight.label: Spotlight
home-spotlight.description: Performer-first: dramatic hero, instructor spotlight and photo gallery.

home-magazine.label: Magazine
home-magazine.description: News-first editorial flow — like a studio journal with class highlights.

home-gallery.label: Gallery
home-gallery.description: Photo portfolio lead — minimal copy, maximum visual impact.

home-community.label: Community
home-community.description: Social proof heavy — reviews, values and a welcoming class grid.

home-momentum.label: Momentum
home-momentum.description: High-energy fitness vibe — stats, classes and enrol-focused CTA.

home-elegant.label: Elegant
home-elegant.description: Refined luxury feel — left-aligned hero, story and faculty.

home-modern.label: Modern Edge
home-modern.description: Clean tech-startup aesthetic — streams, stats and sharp CTAs.

home-festival.label: Festival
home-festival.description: Events-driven — news, schedule preview and enrol CTA.

home-streams.label: Programmes
home-streams.description: Class streams explorer with FAQ — ideal for multi-discipline studios.

home-family.label: Family Welcome
home-family.description: Warm and approachable — values, classes and FAQ for new parents.

home-professional.label: Professional
home-professional.description: Corporate-clean layout — story, values, team and contact.

home-creative.label: Creative Bold
home-creative.description: Agency-style impact — asymmetric hero, gallery and stats.

home-story.label: Storyteller
home-story.description: Narrative journey — layered rich text sections building your brand story.

home-enrol.label: Enrol Focus
home-enrol.description: Conversion-optimised — classes, social proof and multiple enrol prompts.

home-complete.label: Complete
home-complete.description: Everything on one page — the full studio experience in a single scroll.

editor.confirmLeave: Hai modifiche non salvate. Uscire da questa pagina?
editor.previewDraftTitle: Preview draft (opens in admin — publish to share publicly)
editor.multiSelectHint: Arrow keys move all selected elements. Delete removes them. Click one element without Shift to edit it individually.
editor.clickToEdit: Click an element on the page to edit it.
editor.rightClickHint: Or right-click the canvas to add headings, text boxes, images, or buttons.
editor.addElementHint: Click to add at the bottom, or right-click the canvas for a specific spot. Everything snaps to the 12-column grid.
editor.keyboardHint: Arrow keys nudge · ⌘D duplicate · ⌘Z undo · Shift+click multi-select
editor.emptyPageHint: Right-click to add content. Shift+click to multi-select. Pink guides appear when edges align.
editor.canvasHint: Right-click to add · Shift+click multi-select · ⌘Z undo
editor.dragToMove: Drag to move (snaps to grid + guides)

background.title: Page background
background.subtitle: The canvas behind all your elements. Drag blocks on top of it freely.

linkPicker.hint: Choose an existing page or type a path. Use https:// for external links.

media.imagePlaceholder: Paste an image URL or upload
media.videoPlaceholder: Paste a video URL or upload MP4 / WebM

domain.title: Connect your website address
domain.subtitle: A simple step-by-step guide for {studio}. No jargon — just copy, paste, and go live.

intro.title: Your site already has an address
intro.subtitle: Every studio gets a free Olune address — it works right away.
intro.shareToday: Share this link today. Families can view your website and portal from this address.
intro.wantOwn: Want your own domain instead — like {example}? The next steps walk you through it.

decide.title: Do you want your own domain?
decide.subtitle: Optional — your free Olune address always works.

kind.title: Which address do you want?
kind.subtitle: Pick the style that matches what you bought from your domain provider.

subdomain.label: Sub-address
subdomain.hint: Good for a dedicated booking or info page

domain.title: Enter your domain
domain.subtitle: Type exactly what you want families to type in their browser.
domain.label: Your domain

dns.title: Add one DNS record
dns.subtitle: Log in where you bought your domain (GoDaddy, Cloudflare, Namecheap, etc.) and add this record.
dns.step1: Open your domain provider's DNS settings.
dns.step2: Add the record below (copy each value).
dns.step3: Save — changes can take 15 minutes to 48 hours.
dns.tip: If your provider asks for a "TTL", leave the default or choose 3600. The "Host" column might be labelled Name or Subdomain.

connect.title: Connect to Olune
connect.subtitle: Tell Olune your domain so we can show your website when someone visits it.
connect.hint: Click connect below. Then use "Check DNS" — if it's not ready yet, wait 30 minutes and try again.

done.connectedSubtitle: Your custom domain is linked to Olune.
done.readySubtitle: Your free Olune address is ready to share.
done.connectAnytime: You can connect a custom domain any time from Website → Domain setup.

urlBanner.title: Your public website URL
urlBanner.openPreview: Open {url} to preview what families see.
urlBanner.localhostNote: Pages on plain localhost are the Olune platform, not your studio site.
urlBanner.openPreviewAfter: per vedere cosa vedono le famiglie.

preview.refreshHint: Salva nell'editor, poi aggiorna per vedere le ultime modifiche.

public.emptyPage: Questa pagina non ha ancora contenuti.
public.galleryEmpty: Add image URLs to populate the gallery.
public.defaultFooterTagline: Exceptional dance education. World-class training for all ages and abilities.

shop.orderCreated: Order created — complete payment in the member portal.
